info.title: csharp-ls
info.description: C# LSP language server with Visual Studio MSBuild support and lazy solution loading. Fork of csharp-language-server by Saulius Menkevičius with enhancements by Zach Christmas.

options.name: --msbuildpath
options.description:
path to MSBuild directory (e.g., 'C:\Program
Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\2022\Community\MSBuild')

options.name: --msbuildexepath
options.description:
path to MSBuild executable (e.g., 'C:\Program
Files\Microsoft Visual
Studio\2022\Community\MSBuild\Current\Bin\MSBuild.exe'
)
